base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of small_mario_die — a character (playable) from 1985 super mario bros. Death pose — Mario falls backward arms-up. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Death pose — Mario falls backward arms-up; plays at moment of death; composited with upward-then-downward arc in engine, not per-frame animation on sheet
